rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies the decisive generality flaw: genuinely general lemmas (antipode preservation for BialgHom, map_id/map_comp for Bialgebra.TensorProduct) are hidden as `private` inside BaseChange.lean, preventing library reuse — confirmed in the diff. Review 2's primary finding misreads the code (BaseChange.map_comp already delegates to the general form rather than re-proving it), so acting on it yields no improvement.
